[INFO] The user clicks on the element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (ae28a85b76fd79acf9b57f779ba95867)] -> link text: Open New Account]

[INFO] The user selects the value 'SAVINGS' from the drop down
[INFO] The user selects account type: SAVINGS
[INFO] The user waits for the source account dropdown to be populated.
[INFO] The user selects the option at index 0 from the drop down
[INFO] The user selects the first available source account.

[INFO] The user waits for the new account confirmation to appear.
[INFO] The user retrieves the text from the element: Congratulations, your account is now open.
[INFO] The account was successfully opened.
[INFO] The user retrieves the text from the element: 18561
[INFO] New account ID generated: 18561
[INFO] CHECKPOINT: Destination account opened with ID: 18561
[INFO] The user clicks on the element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (ae28a85b76fd79acf9b57f779ba95867)] -> link text: Transfer Funds]
[INFO] The user clicks on Transfer Funds link from the side menu
[INFO] The user waits for the transfer form and dropdowns to be populated.
[INFO] STEP: Initiating transfer of 50$
[INFO] The user starts the transfer process using data from the model
[INFO] The user fills the field with value: 50
[INFO] The user fills the transfer amount with value: 50
[INFO] The user selects the option at index 0 from the drop down
[INFO] The user selects the first available account from 'From Account' drop down
[INFO] The user selects the option at index 1 from the drop down
[INFO] The user selects the second available account from 'To Account' drop down
[INFO] The user clicks on the element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (ae28a85b76fd79acf9b57f779ba95867)] -> xpath: //input[@value='Transfer']]
[INFO] The user clicks on Transfer button
[INFO] The user retrieves the text from the element: Transfer Complete!
[INFO] The user validates that the transfer success message is correct: Transfer Complete
[INFO] The user retrieves the text from the element: $50.00
[INFO] The user retrieves the transferred amount text: $50.00
[INFO] VALIDATION: Transfer of 50$ was successful.
[INFO] ***** EXECUTION FINISHED: Internal Funds Transfer E2E Test *****
